_comment: Reflected catalog of Dynatrace settings 2.0 schemas and classic-API config types that dt-pilot ships scaffolds for. Sync-ConfigCatalog.ps1 reads this file and regenerates modules/configs/<id>/ from each entry. Keep the catalog minimal and curated — adding an entry is a deliberate decision to support that config type with a scaffold; new entries land in a focused PR with the regenerated module in the same commit.

schemas.summary: Service / host / process-group filter used for access control and as a referenceable target by alerting profiles, SLOs, dashboards, and notification configs.
Severity-rule set that gates which problems trigger notifications. Almost always scoped to a management zone via a reference parameter.
Defines an SLO over a metric expression with target and warning thresholds. Typically filtered by a management zone reference.

Email / Slack / webhook / PagerDuty / Jira / OpsGenie / xMatters routing for problems matching an alerting profile. The per-type payload shape differs significantly — generate the schema with Invoke-MonacoGenerate before authoring.
Rule for attaching tags to entities based on attribute / metadata predicates. Tags are the primary way to compose downstream management-zone and alerting filters.
Threshold / baseline anomaly rule over a metric selector; emits CUSTOM_ALERT problems when triggered.
Dashboard payload (tiles, layouts, filters). Templates tend to be large — keep parameters narrow and store the bulk in the JSON.

Per-type scaffold for builtin:problem.notifications when the channel is EMAIL. Other channels (SLACK, WEBHOOK, PAGERDUTY, JIRA, OPSGENIE, XMATTERS) each have their own required fields; consult monaco generate schema before authoring.
